name: mineore
title: Miner Planner
author: CrazyFeSS
description: Automates mining drill placement on ore patches. Drag-select an area, pick drills, belts, poles, beacons, modules, and foundation from a compact icon-based GUI, then ghost entities are placed in optimized paired-row layouts ready for bots. Features smart pole/substation spacing based on supply area, adaptive underground belt placement, quality support (Space Age), polite placement mode, and foundation tiles for any planet surface.
